name: 21st.dev Components
notes: Use the canonical 21st-dev/registry. Avoid serafimcloud/21st and 21st-dev/agent-elements forks. API key goes in .env.local as TWENTYFIRST_API_KEY (or API_KEY_21ST), referenced by name in code, never by value. Update .env.local + git-crypt if you commit secrets.
use_for: Sidebar dashboards, notchatbot UIs, animated registration, magic URLs, blob cursors.

name: UI/UX Pro Max
notes: Design-system rules: spacing scale, typography hierarchy, color tokens. Pairs with 21st-dev-components to prevent 'component soup'.
use_for: Codifying brand design systems; preventing drift across a team.

name: GSAP Frameworks
notes: GSAP is the industry-standard JS animation library. ScrollTrigger is the killer feature. Always pair with prefers-reduced-motion guard.
use_for: Cinematic scroll, pinned sections, kinetic typography, layout morphing (Flip).

name: Three.js Animation
notes: Vanilla Three.js patterns. Use this for non-React projects or when you need direct WebGL control.
use_for: Particle systems, custom shaders, immersive hero sections.

name: Three.js WebGL (React)
notes: React Three Fiber patterns. Use this when your app is already React — R3F composes with React state naturally.
use_for: React-native 3D scenes, shader materials declaratively.

name: Fullstack Dev (built-in)
notes: Next.js 16 + Tailwind 4 + shadcn/ui + Prisma. The scaffold skill — initializes a runnable project in seconds.
use_for: Starting any Next.js project from zero.

name: LLM (built-in)
notes: Backend-only SDK for chat completions, multi-turn context, system prompts. NEVER import on client side.
use_for: Chatbots, AI assistants, content generation, agentic flows.

name: Web Search (built-in)
notes: Real-time web search with structured results. Returns URLs + snippets + metadata.
use_for: Live research, fact-checking, citation gathering.

name: Web Reader (built-in)
notes: Extracts clean article content from any URL. Handles metadata extraction and HTML cleaning.
use_for: Source extraction, RSS-like aggregation, scraping.

name: Image Generation (built-in)
notes: Text-to-image with multiple sizes. Returns base64. Has CLI mode for quick generation.
use_for: Hero illustrations, social cards, concept art.

name: Image Edit (built-in)
notes: Variation/edit existing images via text prompts.
use_for: Asset restyling, redesigns, format transforms.

name: Image Search (built-in)
notes: Real web image search with OSS-hosted reachable URLs.
use_for: Finding reference photos, cover art, illustrations.

name: VLM (built-in)
notes: Vision-language model. Image understanding + chat. Supports image URLs and base64.
use_for: Image analysis, multimodal chat, visual QA.

name: ASR (built-in)
notes: Speech-to-text. Accepts base64 audio.
use_for: Transcription, voice input, podcast indexing.

name: TTS (built-in)
notes: Text-to-speech with multiple voices and speeds.
use_for: Audio content, voice assistants, accessibility.

name: Video Understand (built-in)
notes: Video content analysis — motion, scenes, temporal sequences.
use_for: Video search, content moderation, moment extraction.

name: Charts (built-in)
notes: Routes to matplotlib/seaborn/ECharts/D3/Mermaid/Playwright+CSS based on chart type. FORBIDDEN: matplotlib for mind maps, flowcharts, org charts (use Playwright+CSS).
use_for: Data viz, structural diagrams, dashboards.

name: DOCX (built-in)
notes: Word document creation/editing with formatting preservation and tracked changes.
use_for: Reports, manuscripts, deliverables.

name: PDF (built-in)
notes: Four production lines: Report (ReportLab), Creative (Blueprint+Playwright), Academic (LaTeX), Process (manipulate existing PDFs).
use_for: Polished client deliverables, posters, academic papers.

name: XLSX (built-in)
notes: Excel/CSV/TSV creation, editing, charts, pivot tables.
use_for: Data analysis outputs, financial models, reports.

name: PPTX (built-in)
notes: PowerPoint creation/editing. Beamer module for academic paper presentations (PDF output).
use_for: Pitch decks, conference talks, training materials.

name: Agent Browser (built-in)
notes: Headless browser automation CLI. Navigate, click, type, snapshot. Rust-based with Node.js fallback.
use_for: E2E testing, scraping, screenshot generation, web automation.

name: Skill Creator (built-in)
notes: Create, modify, benchmark custom skills. Use to package your own patterns as installable skills.
use_for: Skill development, team skill sharing.
